data.title: OKX announces the launch of CC (Canton).
data.description: OKX China posted on the X platform that OKX launched CC (Canton) on February 12 and trading is now open.

data.title: Bank of Montreal Expands Brokerage Business in Tokyo with Barclays Hires
data.description: Bank of Montreal has recruited senior bankers from Barclays to bolster its brokerage operations in Tokyo. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the Canadian bank's strategy to capitalize on Japanese interest in foreign securities. As Canada's third-largest lender, Bank of Montreal aims to enhance its presence in the Japanese market by leveraging the expertise of these new hires. This move is part of a broader effort to expand its international footprint and meet the growing demand for overseas investment opportunities among Japanese investors.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Highlights U.S. Economic Growth and Dollar's Reserve Status
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan has stated that the fiscal outlook of the United States is improving, with economic growth showing strong performance. According to ChainCatcher, this development reinforces the U.S. dollar's status as a reserve currency.

data.title: Perp DEX Lighter Introduces Unified Collateral for Trading Accounts
data.description: On February 13, Perp DEX Lighter announced the launch of a new trading account classification. According to BlockBeats, traders can now opt to unify collateral for spot and long-term trades. Lighter stated that this initiative marks the first step in an upgrade plan to support any token as collateral. The next phase involves tokenizing limited liability partnerships (LLP).

data.title: U.S. and Japan Diverge on Priorities for $550 Billion Investment Initiative
data.description: The United States and Japan continue to have differing views on prioritizing projects under a $550 billion investment initiative, despite recent progress in discussions, according to Japanese Trade Minister Ryosei Akazawa. Bloomberg posted on X that the two nations are working to align their strategies, but significant gaps remain in determining which projects should receive initial funding. The investment vehicle aims to bolster economic ties and enhance infrastructure development between the two countries. Both sides are committed to finding common ground to maximize the impact of the investment, though specific project priorities have yet to be agreed upon. The ongoing dialogue reflects the complexity of coordinating such a substantial financial commitment, with each country having distinct economic interests and strategic goals. Further negotiations are expected as both nations strive to finalize the framework for this ambitious initiative.

data.title: The crypto super PAC Fairshake has spent $1.5 million to prevent anti-crypto lawmaker Al Green from being re-elected.
data.description: The crypto super PAC Fairshake is spending $1.5 million on an advertising campaign aimed at preventing Texas Democratic Representative Al Green, a critic of the crypto industry, from winning the primary. The expenditure was pledged by Fairshake's affiliate, Protect Progress. Al Green was rated an "F" by the pro-crypto organization Stand With Crypto for pointing out the potential risks of cryptocurrencies and voting against crypto policy legislation, while his opponent, Christian Menefee, received an "A". Fairshake's $1.5 million investment exceeds the more than $700,000 in campaign funds Al Green has raised so far. Fairshake reportedly has $193 million in reserves and also announced this week that it will spend $5 million to support another pro-crypto Republican Representative, Barry Moore. (Coindesk)

data.title: South Korea Plans to Tighten Cryptocurrency Regulations
data.description: The South Korean Finance Minister has announced plans to enhance regulatory measures in the cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, this initiative indicates a potential increase in oversight and stricter rules impacting crypto trading and operations in South Korea. The announcement underscores the government's growing attention to managing risks linked to digital assets.

data.title: Virtuals Protocol Invests Over $1 Million Monthly to Boost Agent Incentives
data.description:
Virtuals Protocol announced on February 13 that it is investing over $1 million each month to incentivize Agents. According to BlockBeats, the ecosystem is undergoing a J-curve phase, with infrastructure improvements, increased supply, and enhanced tools leading to a faster rollout of Agents than demand, resulting in delayed profitability. The reliance on token transaction fees for revenue has made the system cyclically volatile and fragile.

Virtuals Protocol aims to reduce Agents' dependence on transaction fees by creating a new structure where earnings are derived from genuine skills and tangible service outputs. Without an incentive mechanism, real developers may stagnate before revenue growth occurs. At this pivotal moment, conscious investment is necessary. Virtuals is working to shorten the profitability curve and advance the Agent economy to the next stage, urging all OpenClaw developers to join the Virtuals ecosystem.

data.title: London Stock Exchange Group to Launch Blockchain Settlement Service for Institutional Investors
data.description:
The London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG) announced plans to introduce an on-chain settlement service for institutional investors, named the LSEG Digital Securities Depository. According to PANews, this platform aims to bridge traditional securities markets with blockchain networks, facilitating the trading and settlement of tokenized bonds, stocks, and private market assets while maintaining compatibility with existing infrastructure. The system will support multiple blockchain networks, with an initial delivery target set for 2026, pending regulatory approval.

LSEG has already been operating a blockchain platform for private equity funds on Microsoft Azure, and this new system represents a further expansion of its digital asset strategy. The company plans to form a strategic partnership group to gather market feedback during development, aiming to create an interconnected ecosystem across time zones that supports various payment methods for both digital and traditional markets. Major UK financial institutions such as Barclays, Lloyds, NatWest Markets, Standard Chartered, and Brookfield have expressed their support for the initiative.

data.title: Jupiter Lend Concludes Beta Testing Phase
data.description:
Jupiter announced on February 13 that Jupiter Lend has officially concluded its beta testing phase after six months of development and testing. According to BlockBeats, the platform now boasts 83,000 users and has undergone seven audits and one formal verification without any bad debts. Jupiter has launched a $107,000 audit competition for Jupiter Lend.

Jupiter describes Jupiter Lend as the most advanced money market on Solana, built on Fluid. The platform encompasses over 40 vaults and has received rewards valued at over $2 million from Jup, Fluid, and partners.

data.title: A whale deposited 60,000 SOL tokens into Binance and lost $7.38 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst OnchainLens, a whale deposited 60,000 SOL tokens (worth approximately $4.42 million) into the Binance exchange, incurring a massive loss of $7.38 million. This whale had previously withdrawn 111,945 SOL tokens (worth approximately $17.16 million at the time) for staking, and subsequently redeemed these tokens for only $9.78 million.

data.title: South Korean Stock Market Hits New High Before Decline
data.description: The South Korean stock market reached a new peak at the opening, hitting 5,558 points. According to RTHK, the market then reversed direction, with the Seoul Composite Index recently reported at 5,503 points, marking a decrease of 19 points or 0.35%.

data.title: Jupiter's money market platform, Jupiter Lend, has officially ended its beta testing.
data.description: Jupiter officially announced that its money market platform, Jupiter Lend, has officially ended its Beta testing phase after six months of development and testing. The protocol currently has 83,000 users, has passed seven audits and one formal verification, and has not generated any bad debts. Jupiter has launched an audit competition for Jupiter Lend with a prize of $107,000. Built on Fluid, Jupiter Lend currently covers more than 40 vaults and has received over $2 million in rewards from Jup, Fluid, and partners.

data.title: Key US Democratic senators are calling for the advancement of crypto legislation, while the SEC chairman says the lack of legislation could lead to policy regression.
data.description: According to CoinDesk, SEC Chairman Paul Atkins stated at a Senate Banking Committee hearing that while the agency has the authority to provide regulatory clarity for the crypto industry through rulemaking, such rules lack "future adaptability" and are easily overturned by subsequent governments. Therefore, they "need to be based on a solid legal foundation to prevent future setbacks." Atkins stated that the SEC currently has "considerably broad powers" to advance rulemaking through the "Project Crypto" agenda, but he emphasized that "a good law from Congress" is needed to support these rules. Despite intermittent progress in the Senate regarding legislation regulating the cryptocurrency market structure, Senator Mark Warner, one of the leading Democratic negotiators, stated at the hearing that he still hopes for progress.

data.title: South Korean Finance Minister: Will Strengthen Regulation of the Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: According to Jinshi News, South Korea's Finance Minister stated that the country will strengthen regulation of the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Uncertainty in Today's World Amid Government Actions and AI Advancements
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. In today's rapidly evolving world, uncertainty prevails as individuals grapple with distinguishing reality from fiction. This ambiguity stems from both unpredictable government actions and the rapid advancements in artificial intelligence (AI). The complexity of these developments leaves many questioning the authenticity of information and events. As AI continues to evolve, its impact on society and governance remains a topic of significant discussion and concern.

data.title: New Zealand's Migration Decline Hits Decade Low
data.description: New Zealand's net migration has reached its lowest point in over ten years, excluding the pandemic period, as the number of arrivals decreased and more New Zealanders moved to Australia in search of better opportunities. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the trend of New Zealanders relocating to Australia, driven by the pursuit of improved prospects. The decline in net migration reflects a significant shift in movement patterns, with fewer people entering New Zealand and an increasing number of citizens opting to leave. This trend has implications for the country's labor market and economic dynamics, as the flow of people impacts various sectors. The migration figures underscore the challenges New Zealand faces in retaining its workforce and attracting new talent amid global competition for skilled workers.

data.title: Asian Currencies Stabilize Amid Risk-Off Sentiment
data.description: Asian currencies are showing signs of stabilization as market participants remain cautious due to prevailing risk-off sentiment. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that investors are closely monitoring global economic indicators and geopolitical developments, which could influence currency movements in the region. Analysts suggest that the current market environment, characterized by uncertainty and volatility, may continue to impact the performance of Asian currencies. Traders are advised to stay vigilant as external factors, including central bank policies and international trade dynamics, play a significant role in shaping the currency landscape.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 66,000 USDT with a 2.28% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2026, 00:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 66,000 USDT and is now trading at 65,924.609375 USDT, with a narrowed 2.28% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve Identified as Major Risk to U.S. Economic Growth
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan has identified the Federal Reserve as one of the biggest risks to U.S. economic growth. According to ChainCatcher, this statement highlights concerns about the central bank's influence on the economy. The remarks underscore ongoing debates about the Federal Reserve's role in shaping economic policy and its potential impact on future growth.
